Paweł Bogdanowicz

Hi, thank you for visiting my website.
Here are a few facts about me:

  • I graduaded from hight school and I am starting studing IT at Politechnika Gdańska
  • I am very passionate about programming. I often find myself daydreaming about it and solving problems ;)
  • I also love cycling. It makes me feel free and relaxed.
  • I am ready and eager to utilise my skills and my passion for programming.
